name: dnorthington-portfolio-site
whereILeftOff: Migrated to Vercel. Open: enable image optimization, fix ESM test failures.
currentStateSummary:
Clean maintenance mode. Deployment corrected from Netlify to Vercel:
- Removed `netlify.toml` and `deploy:preview` script (Netlify leftovers)
- Updated all CLAUDE.md, `next.config.ts`, and `package.json` references from Netlify to Vercel
- Site auto-deploys from `main` via Vercel to www.dnorthington.com
openQuestions:
- `images.unoptimized: true` in `next.config.ts` was originally set for Netlify compatibility. Vercel supports Next.js image optimization natively — worth enabling it?
- `@netlify/plugin-nextjs` was listed as a plugin in the deleted `netlify.toml` but was never in `package.json` dependencies — no further cleanup needed there.
